untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern height measurement and comparison to Table 4.6 median values. This is a relative pattern classification metric (height difference / breakout price) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators. The specific median reference table values and pattern-specific height ratios are not available as indicators. Requires manual pattern detection and height ratio calculation.
translation_notes: This signal is a pattern measurement framework rather than a tradeable entry/exit rule. The core concept (dividing pattern height by breakout price) requires custom pattern detection logic and access to specific reference tables (Table 4.6) that are not available in the standard indicator set. Entry/exit conditions above are placeholder directional breakout logic based on context-dependent nature. Actual implementation requires custom pattern recognition module outside standard backtester.
